creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bundled libraries should be unbundled/removed (using system/ports libraries instead) if they can be, per Handbook Section 6.2. Bundled Libraries:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#bundled-libs

Having said that, upstream issue #382

@Yuri Please set maintainer approval flag to +
